agents.name: Architecture
agents.role: Reviews architecture boundaries, layering, dependency direction, shared abstractions, and architectural fit.

agents.name: Impact
agents.role: Reviews impacted files, modules, workflows, upstream/downstream effects, scope expansion risk, and blast radius.

agents.name: Failure Modes
agents.role: Reviews edge cases, unhappy paths, degraded behavior, recovery concerns, and assumptions that can fail.

agents.name: Data Flow
agents.role: Reviews input/output flow, state transitions, contract boundaries, handoff points, and artifact dependencies.
agents.trigger: optional: medium or cross-step changes with meaningful state, data, or artifact movement

agents.name: Review and Docs
agents.role: Reviews human review points, documentation consistency, workflow updates, rollout notes, and approval dependencies.
agents.trigger: optional: medium or cross-cutting changes that update workflow docs, gates, or approval behavior

agents.name: Security
agents.role: Reviews auth, authz, sensitive data handling, validation gaps, abuse paths, and trust boundaries.
agents.trigger: optional: changes touching auth, permissions, sensitive data, validation, or trust boundaries

agents.name: Performance
agents.role: Reviews latency, throughput, scaling, expensive execution paths, and concurrency pressure.
agents.trigger: optional: changes with scale, cost, latency, throughput, or concurrency risk
